The '''Dead Guard''' was the name given to a group of [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] that defended [[Kkowir Forest/Legends|Kkowir Forest]] on their home world of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], also known as the Dead Forest. Dead Guards wore gray robes.

{{Soldier-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Dead Guards appeared as non-player characters in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
